prompt:
A dynamic sports advertisement featuring a young athletic man mid-air performing a powerful jump toward the camera. Dramatic low-angle perspective with extreme foreshortening, emphasizing oversized sneakers in the foreground. He wears a beige hoodie and matching joggers, with white athletic socks.
The sneakers are white with bold orange accents and textured detailing, ultra-sharp focus on the shoe. Background is a vibrant orange gradient with glowing dust particles and motion energy trails beneath the jump, creating a sense of impact and speed.
Clean commercial layout with space for bold typography in the background. High contrast lighting, studio-quality shadows, crisp edges, ultra-realistic materials, 8K detail, professional product photography, Nike/Adidas-style campaign aesthetic.
